TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == sadikuday nu labiian nu Taywan ťô§Ś§ē == sadikuday nu labiian nu Taywan, kalingatuan nu baluhay a mihcaan tu pilisinan, sadikuday nu bulad pahalhal tu sapatata', sadikuday nu buladan kanai'an nu lawad misacakaycakay tu sapisiwgacuan nu tuudan, sadikuday tu nu mihcaan a tuki, kahedekan tu a misilemed atu kalingatuan nu bulad. sadikuday tu nu kalabian sa nu kaliwmaah nu kuyumian tu sadikuday nu bulad a demiadan tu tulu a bataan, sisa hina pangangan han " tabakiay nu buladan tu tulu lasubu nu demiad" "sadikuday tu nu mihcaan a demiad" "sadikuday nu labian tulu a bataan". sadikuday nu kaliwmaah nu kuyumi tu tulu a bataan nu demiadan. hina pangangan han tu " sadikuday nu demiad" "sadikuday nu bulad a demiadan" " sadikuday nu mihcaan a labian" "nu layak a kamuan tu kalabian sa", kanahatu tu mihcaan nu tasa a bulad idaw ku siwa nu demiadan, anumahini hidan tu kinakawaw sa. ťô§Ś§ē, . tatapangan atu likisi ŤĶ∑śļźŤąáś≠∑ŚŹ≤ ina kalabian taneng sipakayda i Sang-caw katukuh i sumamad nu kahedekan nu mihcaan, ina kalabian namakayda i matabala nu Sin-ci zitay nu lisin atu la-ci tu kalecad nu pilisinan. kalabian satu pulungen tu nipipaypay, kapulungan nu lalabu nu luma', mibahbah tu la'cusay, milikeluh tu baluhay a masahicahicaay nu lalangawan. mibahbah tu la'cusay nu demiadan tu mihmihcaan a nipibahbah nu mapalaway, kalikeluhan nu malumanay atu baluhay nu mihcaan u mipaypayay tu tuas atu hatidaay nu di'tuan a kawaw. sulecad sa kinakawaw, sisa ina kalabian hida satu kinakawaw. u kuyumi nu kaliwmaah tu sabaw tusa u "piadupan nu bulad", kalabian yu sumamad nu cudadan hina kamu tu " piadupan kalabian" atu " miasik tu la'cusay' "Ťáėťô§Ś§ē"śąĖ"Ťáėťô§". kakungkuan śįĎťĖďŚā≥Ť™™ yu sumamad, idaw ku makatalay nu kuyuan, caay ka hinatahekal tu demidemiad, itida sa pihedekan nu mihcaan a tahekal i niyaniyaduan a miedis. itidatu tu sadikuday nu mihcaan a tahekal, katahekalan nida sisa pangangan han tu " pisiwgacuan", imi han " tayniay nu mi'disay nu kuyu", lihalay tu tawya a demiad tu nikataynian nu kuyuan, sisa pangangan han tu " kalabian", imi han " bahbahen ku tayniay nu kuyu". kalabian "u kapulungan a malabi, mapulung malabi" angangan ku kalabian, sakalimulak nu lalabu nu luma', ilabi sa asikawaw tu sakalabi. anu icuwacuwa kisu, kanca taluma' namin ku bataday nu tademaw taluma' a malabi. kilul satu aydaay nu syakay, masumadtu ku kalabian. Idaw henay ku misalamiay nu paylumaluma', idaw ku cakayen nanay tu sakalabi nu paylumaluma'. kalabian satu, babalaki pabeli tu wawa tu "mipenec tu la'cusay nu adingu kalisiw". mi'mic tu mihcaan itida i kakungkuan namakayda i " sapipenec tu la'cusay nu adinguan", sisa " mihcaan" atu " suy" malecad ku galgal nu kakamuan, sakakapah nu nikacelakan nu adiwawa a " mipenec tu la'cusay nu adingu nu kalisiw" sisa masumad mala aydaay nu katinenga nu tademaw u " angpaw han". "Ś£ďś≠≤ťĆĘ". yu sumamad mananam ku nuheni u sumanahay a laic tusulen i kalibuwa nu buhangan, aydaay mala u tatipelukay nu kalisiwan u sumanahay a satabu ku sapitabu sisa " angpaw han". i payniyaniyadu', nu caayay pikikung nu lalabu nu luma', taneng miala tu nipabeli nu babalaki a angpaw. caay namin kalecad ku lisin nu katuuday u sakaudip ku tatabuan tu kalisw. . salabisa caay ka kemet milikeluh tu baluhay nu mihcaan Śģąś≠≤ kalabian nu sadikuday nu mihcaan, caay namin kabi' ku lalabuay nu luma' , sisa pangangan han tu " salabisa caay ka kemet milikeluh tu baluhay nu mihcaan", saetim tu paydemidemiad, pakakapah tu nikaudip nu babalai, mihalhal tu baluhay nu mihcaan. yadah ku masahicahicaay nu lalabu nu luma'an, idaw ku mukanay tu uciya malalaluwah, idaw ku mipakiyaway. idaw ku duma nu luma'an tayda i biyu " miaalaw tu angangan nu hiyu", pakakapah tu baluhay nu mihcaan. . patungus mipaypay Á•≠Á•ÄŚĄÄŚľŹ sadikuday nu kalabian, cin-min, yi-lan, cung-yeng mala Cung-hua lalay nu sepatay nu tabakiay nu lisinan. i demiad ku sapatugus mipaypay, u pakan tu babalaki atu tuas, palumaluma idaw ku nipatungus tu hiyu, kakanen, ayam, buting, basis, atu lami' kukuy. namaka tusep pihedekan nu cie, kilusa tu paylumalumaan atu syakay nu nikasumad a lisinan, hamaw satu Hua-zen a masumad ku siki, itida satu i Caw-san nu niyadu'an tu kalabian idaw henay ku nipituduh tu kalisiw nu mapatayay. .
S.PHON: == sadikudaj nu r~…ĺabiian nu tajwan ** == sadikudaj nu r~…ĺabiian nu tajwan, kar~…ĺiŇčatuan nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a mińß ¶aan tu pir~…ĺisinan, sadikudaj nu bur~…ĺad pańßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu sapatata Ē~ °, sadikudaj nu bur~…ĺadan kanai Ē~ °an nu r~…ĺawad misa ¶akaj ¶akaj tu sapisiwga ¶uan nu tuudan, sadikudaj tu nu mińß ¶aan a tuki, kańß…ôd…ôkan tu a misir~…ĺ…ôm…ôd atu kar~…ĺiŇčatuan nu bur~…ĺad. sadikudaj tu nu kar~…ĺabian sa nu kar~…ĺiwmaańß nu kujumian tu sadikudaj nu bur~…ĺad a d…ômiadan tu tur~…ĺu a bataan, sisa ńßina paŇčaŇčan ńßan " tabakiaj nu bur~…ĺadan tu tur~…ĺu r~…ĺasubu nu d…ômiad" "sadikudaj tu nu mińß ¶aan a d…ômiad" "sadikudaj nu r~…ĺabian tur~…ĺu a bataan". sadikudaj nu kar~…ĺiwmaańß nu kujumi tu tur~…ĺu a bataan nu d…ômiadan. ńßina paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " sadikudaj nu d…ômiad" "sadikudaj nu bur~…ĺad a d…ômiadan" " sadikudaj nu mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺabian" "nu r~…ĺajak a kamuan tu kar~…ĺabian sa", kanańßatu tu mińß ¶aan nu tasa a bur~…ĺad idaw ku siwa nu d…ômiadan, anumańßini ńßidan tu kinakawaw sa. **, . tatapaŇčan atu r~…ĺikisi ***** ina kar~…ĺabian tan…ôŇč sipakajda i saŇč- ¶aw katukuńß i sumamad nu kańß…ôd…ôkan nu mińß ¶aan, ina kar~…ĺabian namakajda i matabar~…ĺa nu sin- ¶i zitaj nu r~…ĺisin atu r~…ĺa- ¶i tu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu pir~…ĺisinan. kar~…ĺabian satu pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn tu nipipajpaj, kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mibańßbańß tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj, mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. mibańßbańß tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu d…ômiadan tu mińßmińß ¶aan a nipibańßbańß nu mapar~…ĺawaj, kar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan nu mar~…ĺumanaj atu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan u mipajpajaj tu tuas atu ńßatidaaj nu di Ē~ °tuan a kawaw. sur~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sa kinakawaw, sisa ina kar~…ĺabian ńßida satu kinakawaw. u kujumi nu kar~…ĺiwmaańß tu sabaw tusa u "piadupan nu bur~…ĺad", kar~…ĺabian ju sumamad nu ¶udadan ńßina kamu tu " piadupan kar~…ĺabian" atu " miasik tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj Ē~ ° "***"*"**". kakuŇčkuan **** ju sumamad, idaw ku makatar~…ĺaj nu kujuan, ¶aaj ka ńßinatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu d…ômid…ômiad, itida sa pińß…ôd…ôkan nu mińß ¶aan a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ i nijanijaduan a mi…ôdis. itidatu tu sadikudaj nu mińß ¶aan a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " pisiwga ¶uan", imi ńßan " tajniaj nu mi Ē~ °disaj nu kuju", r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tu tawja a d…ômiad tu nikatajnian nu kujuan, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " kar~…ĺabian", imi ńßan " bańßbańß…ôn ku tajniaj nu kuju". kar~…ĺabian "u kapur~…ĺuŇčan a mar~…ĺabi, mapur~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺabi" aŇčaŇčan ku kar~…ĺabian, sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺak nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ir~…ĺabi sa asikawaw tu sakar~…ĺabi. anu i ¶uwa ¶uwa kisu, kan ¶a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° namin ku batadaj nu tad…ômaw tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a mar~…ĺabi. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu ajdaaj nu sjakaj, masumadtu ku kar~…ĺabian. idaw ńß…ônaj ku misar~…ĺamiaj nu pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, idaw ku ¶akaj…ôn nanaj tu sakar~…ĺabi nu pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kar~…ĺabian satu, babar~…ĺaki pab…ôr~…ĺi tu wawa tu "mip…ôn…ô ¶ tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu adiŇču kar~…ĺisiw". mi Ē~ °mi ¶ tu mińß ¶aan itida i kakuŇčkuan namakajda i " sapip…ôn…ô ¶ tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu adiŇčuan", sisa " mińß ¶aan" atu " suj" mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku gar~…ĺgar~…ĺ nu kakamuan, sakakapańß nu nika ¶…ôr~…ĺakan nu adiwawa a " mip…ôn…ô ¶ tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu adiŇču nu kar~…ĺisiw" sisa masumad mar~…ĺa ajdaaj nu katin…ôŇča nu tad…ômaw u " aŇčpaw ńßan". "***". ju sumamad mananam ku nuńß…ôni u sumanańßaj a r~…ĺai ¶ tusur~…ĺ…ôn i kar~…ĺibuwa nu buńßaŇčan, ajdaaj mar~…ĺa u tatip…ôr~…ĺukaj nu kar~…ĺisiwan u sumanańßaj a satabu ku sapitabu sisa " aŇčpaw ńßan". i pajnijanijadu Ē~ °, nu ¶aajaj pikikuŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, tan…ôŇč miar~…ĺa tu nipab…ôr~…ĺi nu babar~…ĺaki a aŇčpaw. ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺisin nu katuudaj u sakaudip ku tatabuan tu kar~…ĺisw. . sar~…ĺabisa ¶aaj ka k…ôm…ôt mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan ** kar~…ĺabian nu sadikudaj nu mińß ¶aan, ¶aaj namin kabi Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° , sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " sar~…ĺabisa ¶aaj ka k…ôm…ôt mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan", sa…ôtim tu pajd…ômid…ômiad, pakakapańß tu nikaudip nu babar~…ĺai, mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan. jadańß ku masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, idaw ku mukanaj tu u ¶ija mar~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺuwańß, idaw ku mipakijawaj. idaw ku duma nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tajda i biju " miaar~…ĺaw tu aŇčaŇčan nu ńßiju", pakakapańß tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan. . patuŇčus mipajpaj **** sadikudaj nu kar~…ĺabian, ¶in-min, ji-r~…ĺan, ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-ńßua r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu s…ôpataj nu tabakiaj nu r~…ĺisinan. i d…ômiad ku sapatugus mipajpaj, u pakan tu babar~…ĺaki atu tuas, par~…ĺumar~…ĺuma idaw ku nipatuŇčus tu ńßiju, kakan…ôn, ajam, butiŇč, basis, atu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° kukuj. namaka tus…ôp pińß…ôd…ôkan nu ¶i…ô, kir~…ĺusa tu pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan atu sjakaj nu nikasumad a r~…ĺisinan, ńßamaw satu ńßua-z…ôn a masumad ku siki, itida satu i ¶aw-san nu nijadu Ē~ °an tu kar~…ĺabian idaw ńß…ônaj ku nipituduńß tu kar~…ĺisiw nu mapatajaj. .
S.FORM: == sadikuday nu labiian nu Taywan ťô§Ś§ē == sadikuday nu labiian nu Taywan, kalingatuan nu baluhay a mihcaan tu pilisinan, sadikuday nu bulad pahalhal tu sapatata', sadikuday nu buladan kanai'an nu lawad misacakaycakay tu sapisiwgacuan nu tuudan, sadikuday tu nu mihcaan a tuki, kahedekan tu a misilemed atu kalingatuan nu bulad. sadikuday tu nu kalabian sa nu kaliwmaah nu kuyumian tu sadikuday nu bulad a demiadan tu tulu a bataan, sisa hina pangangan han " tabakiay nu buladan tu tulu lasubu nu demiad" "sadikuday tu nu mihcaan a demiad" "sadikuday nu labian tulu a bataan". sadikuday nu kaliwmaah nu kuyumi tu tulu a bataan nu demiadan. hina pangangan han tu " sadikuday nu demiad" "sadikuday nu bulad a demiadan" " sadikuday nu mihcaan a labian" "nu layak a kamuan tu kalabian sa", kanahatu tu mihcaan nu tasa a bulad idaw ku siwa nu demiadan, anumahini hidan tu kinakawaw sa. ťô§Ś§ē, . tatapangan atu likisi ŤĶ∑śļźŤąáś≠∑ŚŹ≤ ina kalabian taneng sipakayda i Sang-caw katukuh i sumamad nu kahedekan nu mihcaan, ina kalabian namakayda i matabala nu Sin-ci zitay nu lisin atu la-ci tu kalecad nu pilisinan. kalabian satu pulungen tu nipipaypay, kapulungan nu lalabu nu luma', mibahbah tu la'cusay, milikeluh tu baluhay a masahicahicaay nu lalangawan. mibahbah tu la'cusay nu demiadan tu mihmihcaan a nipibahbah nu mapalaway, kalikeluhan nu malumanay atu baluhay nu mihcaan u mipaypayay tu tuas atu hatidaay nu di'tuan a kawaw. sulecad sa kinakawaw, sisa ina kalabian hida satu kinakawaw. u kuyumi nu kaliwmaah tu sabaw tusa u "piadupan nu bulad", kalabian yu sumamad nu cudadan hina kamu tu " piadupan kalabian" atu " miasik tu la'cusay' "Ťáėťô§Ś§ē"śąĖ"Ťáėťô§". kakungkuan śįĎťĖďŚā≥Ť™™ yu sumamad, idaw ku makatalay nu kuyuan, caay ka hinatahekal tu demidemiad, itida sa pihedekan nu mihcaan a tahekal i niyaniyaduan a miedis. itidatu tu sadikuday nu mihcaan a tahekal, katahekalan nida sisa pangangan han tu " pisiwgacuan", imi han " tayniay nu mi'disay nu kuyu", lihalay tu tawya a demiad tu nikataynian nu kuyuan, sisa pangangan han tu " kalabian", imi han " bahbahen ku tayniay nu kuyu". kalabian "u kapulungan a malabi, mapulung malabi" angangan ku kalabian, sakalimulak nu lalabu nu luma', ilabi sa asikawaw tu sakalabi. anu icuwacuwa kisu, kanca taluma' namin ku bataday nu tademaw taluma' a malabi. kilul satu aydaay nu syakay, masumadtu ku kalabian. Idaw henay ku misalamiay nu paylumaluma', idaw ku cakayen nanay tu sakalabi nu paylumaluma'. kalabian satu, babalaki pabeli tu wawa tu "mipenec tu la'cusay nu adingu kalisiw". mi'mic tu mihcaan itida i kakungkuan namakayda i " sapipenec tu la'cusay nu adinguan", sisa " mihcaan" atu " suy" malecad ku galgal nu kakamuan, sakakapah nu nikacelakan nu adiwawa a " mipenec tu la'cusay nu adingu nu kalisiw" sisa masumad mala aydaay nu katinenga nu tademaw u " angpaw han". "Ś£ďś≠≤ťĆĘ". yu sumamad mananam ku nuheni u sumanahay a laic tusulen i kalibuwa nu buhangan, aydaay mala u tatipelukay nu kalisiwan u sumanahay a satabu ku sapitabu sisa " angpaw han". i payniyaniyadu', nu caayay pikikung nu lalabu nu luma', taneng miala tu nipabeli nu babalaki a angpaw. caay namin kalecad ku lisin nu katuuday u sakaudip ku tatabuan tu kalisw. . salabisa caay ka kemet milikeluh tu baluhay nu mihcaan Śģąś≠≤ kalabian nu sadikuday nu mihcaan, caay namin kabi' ku lalabuay nu luma' , sisa pangangan han tu " salabisa caay ka kemet milikeluh tu baluhay nu mihcaan", saetim tu paydemidemiad, pakakapah tu nikaudip nu babalai, mihalhal tu baluhay nu mihcaan. yadah ku masahicahicaay nu lalabu nu luma'an, idaw ku mukanay tu uciya malalaluwah, idaw ku mipakiyaway. idaw ku duma nu luma'an tayda i biyu " miaalaw tu angangan nu hiyu", pakakapah tu baluhay nu mihcaan. . patungus mipaypay Á•≠Á•ÄŚĄÄŚľŹ sadikuday nu kalabian, cin-min, yi-lan, cung-yeng mala Cung-hua lalay nu sepatay nu tabakiay nu lisinan. i demiad ku sapatugus mipaypay, u pakan tu babalaki atu tuas, palumaluma idaw ku nipatungus tu hiyu, kakanen, ayam, buting, basis, atu lami' kukuy. namaka tusep pihedekan nu cie, kilusa tu paylumalumaan atu syakay nu nikasumad a lisinan, hamaw satu Hua-zen a masumad ku siki, itida satu i Caw-san nu niyadu'an tu kalabian idaw henay ku nipituduh tu kalisiw nu mapatayay. .

°, sadikudaj nu bur~…ĺadan kanai Ē~ °an nu r~…ĺawad misa ¶akaj ¶akaj tu sapisiwga ¶uan nu tuudan, sadikudaj tu nu mińß ¶aan a tuki, kańß…ôd…ôkan tu a misir~…ĺ…ôm…ôd atu kar~…ĺiŇčatuan nu bur~…ĺad. sadikudaj tu nu kar~…ĺabian sa nu kar~…ĺiwmaańß nu kujumian tu sadikudaj nu bur~…ĺad a d…ômiadan tu tur~…ĺu a bataan, sisa ńßina paŇčaŇčan ńßan " tabakiaj nu bur~…ĺadan tu tur~…ĺu r~…ĺasubu nu d…ômiad" "sadikudaj tu nu mińß ¶aan a d…ômiad" "sadikudaj nu r~…ĺabian tur~…ĺu a bataan". sadikudaj nu kar~…ĺiwmaańß nu kujumi tu tur~…ĺu a bataan nu d…ômiadan. ńßina paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " sadikudaj nu d…ômiad" "sadikudaj nu bur~…ĺad a d…ômiadan" " sadikudaj nu mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺabian" "nu r~…ĺajak a kamuan tu kar~…ĺabian sa", kanańßatu tu mińß ¶aan nu tasa a bur~…ĺad idaw ku siwa nu d…ômiadan, anumańßini ńßidan tu kinakawaw sa. **, . tatapaŇčan atu r~…ĺikisi ***** ina kar~…ĺabian tan…ôŇč sipakajda i saŇč- ¶aw katukuńß i sumamad nu kańß…ôd…ôkan nu mińß ¶aan, ina kar~…ĺabian namakajda i matabar~…ĺa nu sin- ¶i zitaj nu r~…ĺisin atu r~…ĺa- ¶i tu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu pir~…ĺisinan. kar~…ĺabian satu pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn tu nipipajpaj, kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mibańßbańß tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj, mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. mibańßbańß tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu d…ômiadan tu mińßmińß ¶aan a nipibańßbańß nu mapar~…ĺawaj, kar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan nu mar~…ĺumanaj atu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan u mipajpajaj tu tuas atu ńßatidaaj nu di Ē~ °tuan a kawaw. sur~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sa kinakawaw, sisa ina kar~…ĺabian ńßida satu kinakawaw. u kujumi nu kar~…ĺiwmaańß tu sabaw tusa u "piadupan nu bur~…ĺad", kar~…ĺabian ju sumamad nu ¶udadan ńßina kamu tu " piadupan kar~…ĺabian" atu " miasik tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj Ē~ ° "***"*"**". kakuŇčkuan **** ju sumamad, idaw ku makatar~…ĺaj nu kujuan, ¶aaj ka ńßinatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu d…ômid…ômiad, itida sa pińß…ôd…ôkan nu mińß ¶aan a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ i nijanijaduan a mi…ôdis. itidatu tu sadikudaj nu mińß ¶aan a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " pisiwga ¶uan", imi ńßan " tajniaj nu mi Ē~ °disaj nu kuju", r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tu tawja a d…ômiad tu nikatajnian nu kujuan, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " kar~…ĺabian", imi ńßan " bańßbańß…ôn ku tajniaj nu kuju". kar~…ĺabian "u kapur~…ĺuŇčan a mar~…ĺabi, mapur~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺabi" aŇčaŇčan ku kar~…ĺabian, sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺak nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ir~…ĺabi sa asikawaw tu sakar~…ĺabi. anu i ¶uwa ¶uwa kisu, kan ¶a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° namin ku batadaj nu tad…ômaw tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a mar~…ĺabi. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu ajdaaj nu sjakaj, masumadtu ku kar~…ĺabian. idaw ńß…ônaj ku misar~…ĺamiaj nu pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, idaw ku ¶akaj…ôn nanaj tu sakar~…ĺabi nu pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kar~…ĺabian satu, babar~…ĺaki pab…ôr~…ĺi tu wawa tu "mip…ôn…ô ¶ tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu adiŇču kar~…ĺisiw". mi Ē~ °mi ¶ tu mińß ¶aan itida i kakuŇčkuan namakajda i " sapip…ôn…ô ¶ tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu adiŇčuan", sisa " mińß ¶aan" atu " suj" mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku gar~…ĺgar~…ĺ nu kakamuan, sakakapańß nu nika ¶…ôr~…ĺakan nu adiwawa a " mip…ôn…ô ¶ tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu adiŇču nu kar~…ĺisiw" sisa masumad mar~…ĺa ajdaaj nu katin…ôŇča nu tad…ômaw u " aŇčpaw ńßan". "***". ju sumamad mananam ku nuńß…ôni u sumanańßaj a r~…ĺai ¶ tusur~…ĺ…ôn i kar~…ĺibuwa nu buńßaŇčan, ajdaaj mar~…ĺa u tatip…ôr~…ĺukaj nu kar~…ĺisiwan u sumanańßaj a satabu ku sapitabu sisa " aŇčpaw ńßan". i pajnijanijadu Ē~ °, nu ¶aajaj pikikuŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, tan…ôŇč miar~…ĺa tu nipab…ôr~…ĺi nu babar~…ĺaki a aŇčpaw. ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺisin nu katuudaj u sakaudip ku tatabuan tu kar~…ĺisw. . sar~…ĺabisa ¶aaj ka k…ôm…ôt mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan ** kar~…ĺabian nu sadikudaj nu mińß ¶aan, ¶aaj namin kabi Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° , sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " sar~…ĺabisa ¶aaj ka k…ôm…ôt mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan", sa…ôtim tu pajd…ômid…ômiad, pakakapańß tu nikaudip nu babar~…ĺai, mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan. jadańß ku masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, idaw ku mukanaj tu u ¶ija mar~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺuwańß, idaw ku mipakijawaj. idaw ku duma nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tajda i biju " miaar~…ĺaw tu aŇčaŇčan nu ńßiju", pakakapańß tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan. . patuŇčus mipajpaj **** sadikudaj nu kar~…ĺabian, ¶in-min, ji-r~…ĺan, ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-ńßua r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu s…ôpataj nu tabakiaj nu r~…ĺisinan. i d…ômiad ku sapatugus mipajpaj, u pakan tu babar~…ĺaki atu tuas, par~…ĺumar~…ĺuma idaw ku nipatuŇčus tu ńßiju, kakan…ôn, ajam, butiŇč, basis, atu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° kukuj. namaka tus…ôp pińß…ôd…ôkan nu ¶i…ô, kir~…ĺusa tu pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan atu sjakaj nu nikasumad a r~…ĺisinan, ńßamaw satu ńßua-z…ôn a masumad ku siki, itida satu i ¶aw-san nu nijadu Ē~ °an tu kar~…ĺabian idaw ńß…ônaj ku nipituduńß tu kar~…ĺisiw nu mapatajaj. .
